name: Konami
description: Japanese developer and publisher known for Castlevania, Contra, Metal Gear, Gradius, Bomberman, and arcade classics.

eras.title: Arcade and Famicom Era
eras.description: Arcade growth and major NES/Famicom franchises.

eras.title: Console Golden Era
eras.description: Peak period for Castlevania, Contra, Metal Gear, Silent Hill, and rhythm games.

eras.title: Late Kojima and Decline Era
eras.description: Later Kojima productions and reduced traditional console focus.

eras.title: Legacy Revival Era
eras.description: Collections, remakes, and selective revivals of legacy franchises.

notes: Hudson Soft merged into Konami in 2012, but Hudson is better represented as a defunct company with Konami as successor rather than as an active child.
